name: Weatherford International plc
description: Weatherford International plc is a leading global energy services company that provides innovative solutions for the oil and gas industry. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of products and services spanning the entire life cycle of a well, including drilling, evaluation, completion, production, and intervention. With a strong commitment to safety, efficiency, and technological advancement, Weatherford helps operators maximize reservoir performance and optimize well construction. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company operates in numerous countries worldwide, delivering integrated solutions that address complex challenges in both conventional and unconventional energy environments.
